I LOVE GARRY MY UNDERRATED POOKIE BEAR UGHH

More people need to love Garry, this isn’t fair

I haven’t played the game in a few years, so sorry if he isn’t the most accurate!

If you’re wondering why he’s tagged as male AND nonbinary, it’s because I headcanon Garry as either nonbinary or a demiboy due to something on his wiki page (“In Japanese, Garry uses the personal pronoun atashi (an effeminate way of saying "I/me"), as well as feminine onee speech patterns. Kouri has stated that Garry is "someone who’d like to cross the barriers of gender", along with a drawing of him in a women's kimono.)
